findings.summary: WXTacticalUI is split with backslash-newline line splicing in four locations.
findings.details: The code compiles because the preprocessor joins the lines, but the hidden line splicing hurts readability, code search, and maintainability while deviating from normal project conventions.

test_sufficiency_summary: Re-ran `cd src/tactical && make clean >/dev/null && make` and `cd tests/tactical && make && ./TacticalTests` on current HEAD; build passed and TacticalTests reported OK (76 tests). Coverage is acceptable for this localized ownership/lifecycle wiring change.
documentation_accuracy_summary: doc/DesignNotes.md and AGENTS.md match the implemented additive ownership/lifecycle wiring and correctly avoid claiming that the live tactical wx runtime has already been rewired.
notes: Reviewed combined diff against gui_sep for implementation, documentation, and artifact scope.
Tester-reported build/test results remain consistent with verifier-branch HEAD state.
No blocking findings were identified; scope and documentation accuracy are acceptable for Subtask 2.
